item.title: Amazon Stock In Focus: Warren Buffett Cuts Stake, Bill Ackman Loads Up In Divergent Bets
item.description: AMZN stock underperformed benchmark indices last year and faced a sharp selloff in recent weeks.

item.title: Walmart Earnings Ahead: Can WMT Stock Sustain Momentum Under New CEO?
item.description: A new CEO, hitting $1 trillion for the first and an uncertain economy put the focus on the retail behemoth’s earnings.

item.title: COIN’s Stock Rises Pre-Market After Cathie Wood Picks Up More Shares For Nearly $7 Million
item.description: Coinbase’s stock has been stretching its post-earnings rally since Friday, despite bearish calls from Wall Street after the company reported revenue a...

item.title: CMPS Stock Slumps Premarket As $150M Offering Cuts Into Psychedelic Trial Buzz
item.description: The company is planning to seek FDA guidance on a rolling review and target a New Drug Application submission in the fourth quarter.

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Edge Higher Ahead Of Fed Minutes: Why NVDA, TSLA, AAPL, APLD, PANW Are On Traders' Radar Today
item.description: Data from Stocktwits indicated retail sentiment was stabilizing for SPY and QQQ.
